tooltips.message_count: Total messages received from this book (includes successful, failed, and pending)
tooltips.forwarded_count: Messages successfully forwarded to output platform
tooltips.failed_count: Messages that failed to forward (check logs for details)
tooltips.status_success: Message successfully delivered to output platform
tooltips.status_failed: Message delivery failed (check Discord webhook, rate limits, or network)
tooltips.rate_limit: Messages per minute allowed by output platform
tooltips.onboarding_step1: Name your book and select platform
tooltips.onboarding_step2: Send join code via WhatsApp to activate
